text_block_list.text:
One day, Mayano Top Gun and I are summoned
to the student council office...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You want me to be a guest at a fashion
show?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. It's part of a PR event for the
academy. The attendees voted on which signature
racewear they'd like to see.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The wedding signature racewear from the Beauty
Dream Cup emerged victorious, so we called you
here since you own it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Eee! I love that outfit too! Wait a second. Doesn't
that mean...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I, too, have the same outfit, so I'll be
participating as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, we also require that someone escort
you down the runway as part of our vision.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You can hold applications for fans or ask
someone you know. Just let us know your decision
by tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Escorted by a fan... or someone I know, huh?
Actually, I...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I-if I walked with a fan, I'm sure they'd be really
happy! Or I could ask Fuji. I'm sure she'd be really
good at it...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But... if a certain someone were to ask me to pick
them, then... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Come on! Take the hint already!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fine! I guess I'll just come up with the best
strategy to get through to you!

With that, I stand back and watch as Mayano Top
Gun's strategy unfolds...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Everyone's dying to know who you
picked to walk you down the runway!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aw, thanks! I definitely have to find an applicant soon! Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited for the event! I'd totally apply if
fans were allowed to!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I sure am popular, huh? ☆ If no one asks to walk me down the runway, I might just have to open applications to the public! Ahem...

A few days later, she still hasn't chosen an escort.
As I'm wondering why...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. I've come to speak to you directly
about a certain matter. I trust you're aware of
which one, yes?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand the gravity of this decision, but I
can't wait forever. Please, I need an answer—
Stooop! Trainer, what's going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Escort role?! "I can't wait forever"?! Are you gonna be Air Groove's escort?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But... but... I've been waiting this whole time for you to ask me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're my partner! I wanted you to ask me, not
the other way around...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you to say something, but
now Air Groove's asked you?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wait a moment! What are talking about? I've
already selected someone else to escort me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! Th-then... the reply for the escort role...
choice_data_list: She just wants to know who you've chosen.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Ohhh! I totally misread the situation then!
Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ha... Haha... Sorry for the misunderstanding. I
thought my strategy of playing hard to get had
totally failed...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oops!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Fine! I thought that you'd see how popular
I was, panic, and then ask me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to know... that you value me more than
anyone else.
choice_data_list: Can you give me one more chance?
Of course I value you the most.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You leave me no choice! Just one though!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Yaaay! Ehehe, I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll go file the forms. Sigh... Please don't cause a ruckus the day of. Are we clear?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I can't wait! The outfit is already perfect.
All that's left is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, but I don't think my heart will ever
stop pounding! I'll never be the same again...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy! Let's make this an incredible fashion
show, okay?

We walk out onto the runway full of excitement,
and it ends up being a great success.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
R-really? I'm special? I'm the most precious? I
twinkle the brightest?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! My plan may have failed, but I guess it all
worked out in the end since I found out how you
really feel about me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready? I'm gonna make you say even
more incredible things on the day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'll go file the forms. I ask that you not cause any trouble on the day of the event, incredible or not.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ☆ Thanks for your support, everyone! I'm so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My trainer and I both promise to both keep on
twinkling from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer? ♪

The crowd roars in response to this declaration,
and the event ends in brilliant success!
